KXMLSGAME-26JUL16SEAPOR-POR.rules_primary: If Portland wins the Seattle vs Portland professional MLS soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 16, 2026 after 90 minutes plus stoppage time (does not include extra time or penalties), then the market resolves to Yes.
KXMLSGAME-26JUL16SEAPOR-POR.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Seattle vs Portland professional MLS soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 16, 2026 after 90 minutes plus stoppage time (does not include extra time or penalties). If the game ends in a tie, the market called "Tie" resolves to Yes. If the game is cancelled or rescheduled to over two weeks away, the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules.
